title: quercus corrugata var. typica
intro: Quercus corrugata var. typica is a variety of Quercus corrugata, a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayas. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat a variety of ailments. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Quercus corrugata var. typica can be made into a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion.
